name: skillmarkdown
description: Registry and workspace CLI for authoring, publishing, and installing SKILL.md-based AI skills

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && node scripts/build-bundle.mjs && node scripts/ensure-cli-executable.mjs
scripts.build:debug: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && node scripts/build-bundle.mjs --debug && node scripts/ensure-cli-executable.mjs
scripts.build:test: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build-bundle.mjs && node scripts/ensure-cli-executable.mjs
scripts.ci:check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run check:unused && npm run check:src-loc && npm test && npm run check:pack-size
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.sweep:commands:dev: npm run build && node scripts/command-sweep.mjs --env dev --write --allow-auth-blocked
scripts.sweep:commands:dev:extended: npm run build && node scripts/command-sweep.mjs --env dev --write --extended --allow-auth-blocked
scripts.sweep:commands:prod: npm run build && node scripts/command-sweep.mjs --env prod --allow-auth-blocked
scripts.sweep:commands:prod:extended: npm run build && node scripts/command-sweep.mjs --env prod --write --extended --allow-auth-blocked
scripts.sweep:commands:both: npm run build && node scripts/command-sweep.mjs --env both --allow-auth-blocked
scripts.sweep:commands:both:extended: npm run build && node scripts/command-sweep.mjs --env both --write --extended --allow-auth-blocked
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:test && rm -rf coverage && mkdir -p coverage/v8 && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=coverage/v8 node --test --experimental-test-coverage
